assertions.title: Six disciplines with originators
assertions.reason: Approach page lists all six disciplines and credits the specified originators where required.
evidence: content-check: page text includes Structural Dynamics (Robert Fritz), Natural Law (Curt Doolittle / Natural Law Institute), Currency Design (Arthur Brock), Collective Intelligence, Operative Traditions (Miguel Angel Fernandez), Formation (with Exosphere, Volta, Modern Minuteman)

assertions.title: Synthesis described
assertions.reason: The page explains what simultaneous use of all disciplines produces beyond a simple list.
evidence: content-check: includes 'Looking through all these lenses simultaneously produces a unified perception, a structural clarity that none can achieve in isolation.'

assertions.title: Via negativa as via positiva
assertions.reason: The opening section explicitly states that constraints require active enactment and frames via negativa as via positiva.
evidence: content-check: includes 'Even the via negativa... is itself a via positiva. It must be actively enacted.'

assertions.title: Who this is for stated plainly
assertions.reason: The Alignment section clearly states who the work is for and explicitly who it is not for in direct language.
evidence: content-check: includes both 'This work is for:' and 'It is not for:' statements

assertions.title: Background described
assertions.reason: About page states 4+ years of direct involvement in agent orchestration, multi-model systems, and frontier tooling.
evidence: content-check: includes 'over four years of direct involvement in agent orchestration, multi-model systems, and frontier tooling'

assertions.title: Formation lineage present
assertions.reason: About page contains a Formation Lineage section naming Exosphere, Volta, and Modern Minuteman.
evidence: content-check: Formation Lineage lists Exosphere, Volta, Modern Minuteman

assertions.title: Operative tradition framing
assertions.reason: The page explicitly frames Statecraft Systems as an operative tradition and contrasts it against consultancy framing.
evidence: content-check: includes 'We are not a consultancy with a philosophy. We are an operative tradition in formation.'

assertions.title: Link to moritzbierling.com
assertions.reason: About page has working moritzbierling.com links and external GET returns 200.
evidence: selector-check: about page links @e8 and @e14 href -> https://moritzbierling.com

summary: Tested 8 assigned assertions in web UI scope (Approach + About). All 8 passed with screenshot, content, console, and network evidence.
